---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest something you'd like to see in GrimoireScribe
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the writing workflow problem or frustration this would address. The more specific the better — "I want X" is less useful than "When I do Y, I have to Z which is painful because..."

**Describe the feature**
A clear description of what you're proposing.

**Have you seen this done well elsewhere?**
If another app handles this in a way you like, mention it. Screenshots welcome.

**How important is this to you?**
- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Would use it regularly
- [ ] Blocking me from using GrimoireScribe

**Anything else?**
Any other context, mockups, or examples.
